model: Each category picks one item by weighted random draw. Optional categories also carry a 'none' weight (chance the alpaca wears nothing in that slot). Per-item weight = its tier weight unless an explicit 'weight' override is set on the item in traits.json.

legendary.label: Legendary
legendary.targetShare: ~2% (very rare aura/standout traits, e.g. Golden Glow)

categoryLabels.comment: Display names for categories. Internal keys are kept stable; 'necklace' displays as 'Neck Accessories'.

categoryNoneWeight.comment: Weight of the empty/none option for optional categories, expressed on the same scale as tier weights. Higher = the slot is more often empty. Required categories (background, fur, mouth) have no 'none'.

defaults.comment: For required categories, these default items are weighted heavily so most alpacas keep the canonical look; variants are the rarer standouts.

notes: These weights are the starting point for the FULL library; the review batch does not need to hit these distributions.
Legendary NFTs and the Reserved NFTs (Reserved includes Founder #001) are outside this rarity model entirely — they are hand-designed, not drawn from weights.
Rarity for HANSOME-original traits (mouth flowers, wool styles, face marks) is intentionally skewed so the cozy defaults dominate and special nature traits feel earned.

Clothing is intentionally a small pool (Cozy Wool Scarf, Festival Ribbon Outfit). After the Phase 2 sim (scarf worn ~53%), its 'none' weight was raised 60 → 110 so the bare-wool cozy look stays dominant. Farmer Overalls / Farm Vest / Explorer Cape were removed for reading too human-like / RPG-like.
Hat 'none' weight was raised 70 → 140 after the Phase 2 sim (hats appeared on ~86%) so bare, fluffy alpacas are meaningfully common and the collection is not over-accessorized.
